name: Webinar Planning Template
description: Webinar Planning Template - Marketing template for content professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template 1. Webinar Brief Define topic, format, speakers, and goals. 2. Promotion Plan Map your multi-channel promotion timeline. 3. Run of Show Plan the minute-by-minute webinar flow. 4. Registration Tracker Track signups, sources, and attendance. 5. Speaker Management Coordinate speakers, bios, and logistics. 6. Tech Checklist Ensure all technology is tested and ready. 7. Follow-Up Plan Automate post-webinar nurture and content repurposing. 8. Performance Tracker Measure webinar success against KPIs.

sections.title: Dashboard
sections.description: Auto-calculated summary of your data. Complete the working sections to see results here.
